Could I speak to Laura, please?
Could you hold on a moment, please?
Can I take a message?
Could you call me back this afternoon?
Is Ms. Costa available now?
I will get back to you today.
Hello, could I speak to Laura, please?
Could you call me back when you are free?
Hello, could I speak to Mr. Costa, please?
Sorry, she is not available right now.
Could you call me back? It is a little urgent.

Hi, this is Daniel from Redpoint Marketing. I am calling for Laura about our campaign meeting. I am sorry I missed you. I wanted to let you know that our Thursday call needs to move. Something urgent came up with a client, so Thursday at ten is no longer possible for me. Could we schedule the call for Friday morning instead? I am available any time before noon. If Friday does not work, please call me back and we will find another time. You can reach me on my mobile, or just leave a message and I will get back to you today. Thanks a lot. Talk soon. Bye.
